description: User examines the search results for travel from Rome to Palermo on Rome2Rio.
User types 'london' into the origin search field, triggering a dropdown of location suggestions.
User types 'ireland' into the destination search field.
User clicks the search button (pink circle with checkmark) to update the travel route.
The page navigates from 'Rome to Palermo' to 'Rome to Ireland' results.
User clicks back into the origin search field, which still displays 'Rome, Italy' but shows 'london, England' as a recent suggestion.
